title: Dogfooding Planning Safety 935 Plus

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Fix the actionable dogfooding issues #935 and above by making broad/high-assurance planning-safety failures visible before implementation proceeds.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not widen into a full planning provenance system unless it is necessary for this safety gate. Preserve direct narrow-work fast paths. Use the workspace front-door CLI in user-facing commands.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Implement one shared start/implement planning-safety gate, add concrete promotion/escalation guidance, and route any remaining manual-provenance work honestly.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A fix requires durable mutation provenance, a new planning state schema, or broad rewrite of planning installer surfaces.
canonical_core.next_action: Add a root workspace planning-safety gate that blocks or flags broad/high-assurance/decomposed implementation without active execplan ownership and detects changed-path scope growth.
proof_expectations: uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/cli.py packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py tests/test_workspace_start_preflight_cli.py tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py packages/planning/tests/test_promote.py
completion_criteria: The start and implement commands expose a planning-safety gate for broad, high-assurance, decomposed, or multi-issue work without an active execplan.
implement --changed flags implementation paths that lack active planning ownership and distinguishes planning-only from planning-plus-implementation changes.
Changed-path scope growth across multiple boundaries returns a planning escalation state with a concrete new-plan command.
Decomposition-backed work without active planning points to a concrete planning command before implementation.
Delegation suitability from decompositions remains visible as a required recorded decision when present.
Any remaining issue scope, especially durable manual-provenance stamping, is routed explicitly rather than claimed as complete.

goal: Make the #933 dogfooding failure mode harder to repeat: broad/high-assurance or decomposed implementation should require active planning ownership or return a clear violation/escalation route.
Preserve the cheap direct path for truly narrow edits.
non_goals: Do not implement a full provenance/stamping ledger for every managed planning mutation in this slice.
Do not rewrite planning installer mutation commands unless root start/implement routing cannot satisfy the actionable safety gate.
Do not claim the whole codegen epic is complete.

intent.outcome: Planning safety gate for GitHub #935 #936 #938 #939 #940 with honest routing for #937.
intent.constraints: Stay within root workspace routing and focused tests unless provenance support becomes unavoidable.
intent.latitude: Add derived guard payloads, warnings, next actions, and tests that enforce planning escalation before broad implementation.
intent.escalation: Escalate if durable provenance stamping or schema migration is required.

execution.next_step: Add a root workspace planning-safety gate that blocks or flags broad/high-assurance/decomposed implementation without active execplan ownership and detects changed-path scope growth.
execution.proof: Focused workspace CLI tests, contract tooling check, ruff, and planning checks.

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Fix dogfooding planning-safety findings #935 and above.
intent_continuity.this slice completes the larger intended: partial until proof and issue reconciliation confirm which issues close.
intent_continuity.continuation surface: GitHub #937 if durable managed-surface provenance remains outside this slice.

required_continuation.activation trigger: If the root planning-safety gate does not implement durable mutation provenance or emergency recovery stamping.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: The workspace front door now blocks or flags high-risk planning-bypass shapes before implementation proceeds.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Durable manual edit provenance/stamping remains with GitHub #937 unless a later slice promotes it.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The compact selector projection must omit absent optional gates rather than emit null values, because schema validation treats null as a real incompatible value.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Focused CLI tests, contract tooling, ruff, planning checks, summary, and planning doctor passed.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: GitHub issue reconciliation and PR CI after push.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: Return to the active Python codegen lane after issue reconciliation.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Fix the dogfooding findings #935 and above.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Prevent planning-bypass and boundary-growth failures observed during #933.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Root start/implement planning-safety gate plus tests for no-active-plan, decomposition, delegation-decision, dirty implementation WIP, and scope growth.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Check issue closure one by one; do not close #937 unless provenance/recovery-mode acceptance is actually implemented.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: src/agentic_workspace/cli.py; packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py; tests/test_workspace_start_preflight_cli.py; tests/test_workspace_summary_cli.py; packages/planning/tests/test_promote.py; this execplan; planning state.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: Focused workspace CLI pytest, contract tooling check, ruff.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Stop before adding a new provenance storage format or broad planning installer rewrite.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Generated CLI packages, operation IR contracts, unrelated planning installer mutation internals, or codegen runtime surfaces.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A correct fix requires changing the requested outcome or ownership boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

context_budget.live working set: This execplan, the promoted item, and the narrow files needed for the current implementation step.
context_budget.recoverable later: Repo background, historical reviews, and deferred backlog unless compact outputs point there.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, finished_run_review, and closeout_distillation before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: Use compact config/startup/summary outputs before opening raw planning or routing files.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Route to the narrowest relevant memory only when the task needs durable repo knowledge.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Implement and test a root workspace planning-safety gate for #935/#936/#938/#939/#940; route #937 if provenance remains.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Proof failure, scope drift, interruption, handoff, or closeout.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Fix dogfooding planning-safety findings #935 and above.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep durable provenance out of scope unless needed; keep narrow direct work cheap.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact payload shape, warning names, tests, and issue reconciliation.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Durable mutation provenance or broad planning command refactor is required.

post_decomposition_delegation.decision rule: This is a tightly coupled root routing/test change; reassess delegation only if a separable planning-provenance follow-up is promoted.
post_decomposition_delegation.required evidence: keep-local because the changed surface is one routing function family plus tests and needs immediate integration proof

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve the larger intended outcome separately from this bounded slice.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Keep the slice bounded while carrying any larger follow-on through explicit continuation fields.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Did this slice advance the declared larger outcome, or only complete the local task?

execution_run.what happened: Added planning-safety gate payloads to start and implement paths, added decomposition-lane promotion support, schema support, focused tests, and schema reference updates.

execution_run.result for continuation: Issue reconciliation remains; #937 should stay open unless durable mutation provenance is later implemented.
execution_run.next step: Reconcile GitHub #935 through #940 honestly, then commit and push this slice.

finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low for the bounded safety-gate slice; high if this is mistaken for full provenance/stamping completion

proof_report.proof achieved now: The focused CLI tests, contract tooling, selected ruff check, make check-planning, git diff --check, summary, and planning doctor all passed after implementation.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: 83 focused tests passed; contract tooling reported [ok]; selected ruff reported all checks passed; make check-planning reported all subchecks ok; planning doctor health was healthy.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The implemented gate covers active execplan enforcement, scope growth escalation, decomposition-lane promotion guidance, and dirty implementation WIP detection. It does not implement durable manual edit provenance/stamping.

execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: this execplan and GitHub issue reconciliation
execution_summary.resume from: GitHub #937 if provenance is promoted, otherwise return to the Python codegen lane

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: The implemented gate prevents the observed no-plan and scope-growth failures, but durable managed-surface mutation provenance is explicitly outside this slice.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: GitHub #937 remains the continuation owner for manual edit provenance/stamping.
closure_check.reopen trigger: A future broad planning mutation can still be performed manually without durable provenance evidence.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
